creator: melsonr@earthlink.net
text:
gramps now starts but fails to read preexisting databases and will not
import standard format gedcom files.  A quick'n'dirty test shows it
allows manual data input, creates a new database and will re-read that
database on restart, but the failure to read databases that existed and
were in use before the upgrade from 3.1.x to 3.2.x, as well as it's
inability to import standard gedcom files is a major problem for this
type of application.  This should probably be a new PR, but ..?

Thanks for your efforts.

Bob Melson

-- 
Robert G. Melson | Rio Grande MicroSolutions | El Paso, Texas

Nothing astonishes men so much as common sense and plain dealing.
Ralph Waldo Emerson
